query:
SELECT tl.to_kind, COUNT(*) AS "count!"
        FROM thought_links tl
        WHERE tl.from_thought_id = ANY($1::uuid[])
          AND tl.deleted_at IS NULL
          AND tl.to_kind <> 'thought'
          AND (cardinality($2::text[]) = 0 OR tl.relation = ANY($2::text[]))
        GROUP BY tl.to_kind
